user_system_path: Elevate the live landing (components/foldera/LandingPage.tsx) to a production-grade dark/cyan aesthetic — glowing Right Now card with connector chips, background atmosphere, depth on cards, tighter type — while preserving every data-testid, heading, copy string, and href so the e2e suite stays green. Owner-authorized to ship to live via PR + merge.
forbidden_files_raw: No backend, no schema, no API, no dependency changes. Visual re-skin of one component only.
required_local_proof: npm run build && npm run lint && npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts && npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-hero-visual-qa.spec.ts tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts
required_browser_proof: Landing renders at / with all testids, headings, copy intact; no horizontal overflow at 375/390; premium dark/cyan visuals.
acceptance_condition: The live landing route / renders the elevated dark/cyan design with every preserved data-testid, heading, copy string, and href; public-routes + landing-hero-visual-qa + dashboard-navigation + authenticated-routes e2e pass; build + lint + large-file-splits pass; no horizontal overflow at 375/390.
anti_regression_checks: No horizontal overflow at mobile widths
stop_condition: Stop when issue #370 has a merged PR with build + lint + e2e proof green.
next_command: After merge, verify the production deploy renders the new landing; then return control plane to awaiting next seam.
